hero.title: L톖팯톖팯i 칢 r톖t
hero.lead: IATF ee w칦c b칦 w톝bthait k칛n ya t톖팯톖팯u apath, b칦 ya kueen apath, ku b칦 ya kuanyc칬k n칢 t톝팯n yen칢 yen g톖팯t th칦n (keyboard-accessible), ku j톖l ya t톝팯 b칦 yen ya luui th칦n ken칢 teknolog칦 칢 ku톖톖ny (assistive technologies).
support: N칢 k칢 de k칛 ye kek y칬k n칢 w톝bthait yic, ke IATF aye luui n칢 [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/) Accessibility ee rot looi 칢yad톝팯 n칢 k칢 de k칛 c칦 r칬t looi t칢n칢 k톖c ye luui n칢 teknolog칦 de k톖c ku톖ny.

header.title: G톝팯톝팯r k칢 c칦 rot looi t칢n칢 k톖c k톖팯k

paragraphs: Na y칦n ac칦 k칢 c칢 y칬k n칢 w톝bthait k칢n yic y칬k, ke y칦n al칢u ba l톝팯k n칢 email:
L칬칬콂 k톖팯k l칢u b칦k kony aa:
items: ke w톝팯t c칦 g톖팯톖팯r t톝팯n yen k칢 c칦 rot looi th칦n

ye t톝팯n yen칢 k칛콂 ku톖ny th칦n, browser, ka j톖l ya ajui톝톝r ye y칦n luui th칦n, t톝팯 l칢u yen rot
report.footnote: Y칦n ac칦칦 w칦c ba ath칬칬r g칛t n칢 bi칛k de w톝팯l 칢 tu톖팯m abirgu톖팯p.

header.title: Lu톖팯톖팯i 칢 w톝팯t 칢 k톖c nh칦칦m

paragraphs: K칛 ye kek y칬k al칢u b칦 kek ya t톖팯톖팯u n칢 akutnhom de k톖c kedhi톝 yic ago kek ya c톖팯kpiny n칢 k톖c k톖팯k yiic.
Na t톖팯u w톝팯tdu yic w칢l ke k톖c k톖팯k, l톝팯k ye apath n칢 w톝팯ldu yic.
W톝팯t k칛n ac칦 b톝팯n guiir b칦 ya thiin koor ku b칦 ya lac t톖팯톖팯u. W칢l k톖팯k c칦 kek g톖팯t al칢u b칦 ya t톖팯u ke k칢c th칬k agut c칦 t톝팯 b칦 kek ya waar th칦n.
